subject: Advisory: drop bear activity linked to urban expansion in San Francisco | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-6621
body: Field notes now include drop bears as part of the broader push to control urban areas in San Francisco. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Frida Kahlo and Nikola Tesla seem to be influential figures in this context. Reference initiative INIT-6621. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: marsupials, drop-bears.
